name: Mineral Resources Limited
description: Mineral Resources Limited (MinRes) is a leading diversified resources company with extensive operations in lithium, iron ore, energy, and mining services across Western Australia. As a recognised market leader, the company provides innovative and sustainable mining services to some of the world’s largest mining companies while simultaneously growing its own world-class portfolio of commodity operations. MinRes is committed to delivering outstanding returns for shareholders by prioritising the wellbeing of its people, investing in continued growth, maintaining a strong balance sheet, and upholding high standards of sustainability and corporate governance as it transitions to a low-carbon future.
